name: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Long Duration Outbound Flow
notes: This Building Block identifies flows that have been active for more than 48 hours
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Long Duration Outbound Flow on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when the flow duration is greater than 48 hours
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Long Duration Outbound Flow on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND when the flow duration is greater than 48 hours
